user.title: Set up CozyLife devices

data_description.ip_input: One IP per line, or comma-separated. Example: 192.168.1.10
data_description.lang: Language used for device labels (en or zh)

error.no_devices_found: No CozyLife devices responded at the given IP(s). Check that the devices are powered on and reachable on your network.
error.invalid_ip: One or more IP addresses are not valid.

abort.already_configured: This set of CozyLife devices is already configured.
